candidates.why: Exact match for total current assets on the balance sheet.
Balancing/subtotal line, not the preferred reported total.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit total current assets line.

candidates.why: Direct balance sheet cash and cash equivalents line.
Cash balance from cash flow statement, but balance sheet cash line is preferred for CHE.

variables.notes: Used the balance sheet cash line as preferred.

candidates.why: Exact match for total current liabilities.
Balancing line, not preferred when explicit total exists.
Only a component of current liabilities, not the total.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit total current liabilities line.

candidates.why: Best clean total for current financing debt; separate lease liabilities are disclosed, so this likely excludes leases and avoids summing components.
Current portion of long-term debt, but only one component and not available across years.
Debt component only; using it alone would understate total short-term debt.

variables.notes: Chose a confident label outside the shortlist: 'Interest-bearing current liabilities'. It is the clean current debt total and is preferred over summing components like overdraft or debt maturities. Lease liabilities are shown separately, supporting exclusion of leases.

candidates.why: Direct match for taxes payable/current tax liabilities.
Tax-related but not the standard income-tax payable target.

variables.notes: Selected current tax liabilities as taxes payable.

candidates.why: Best balance sheet label corresponding to property, plant and equipment (net PPE).
Capex flow, not balance sheet PPE stock.

variables.notes: Used the reported net tangible fixed assets line as PPE.
Selected the explicit total assets line.

candidates.row_label: Cash flow from operating activities Cash flow from investing activities
candidates.why: Despite the concatenated label, values align with net cash from operating activities after interest and taxes; best match for operating cash flow.
Could represent operating cash flow before some adjustments; less clearly the final net operating cash flow line.

candidates.row_label: Cash Generated from Operations - Balancing value
candidates.why: Balancing line and mostly blank, not preferred.

final_choice.row_label: Cash flow from operating activities Cash flow from investing activities

variables.notes: Selected the net operating cash flow line. The label appears concatenated with the next section header, but it is exactly as written in column A and the values fit OANCF.
